summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CONER app - backend fully functional, frontend has critical overlay issues preventing user interactions

ui_bugs.issue: Card elements intercepting pointer events preventing button clicks and navigation
ui_bugs.details: Users cannot click buttons or links due to overlay issues. Force clicks work in testing but normal user interaction fails.

ui_bugs.issue: Error messages not appearing in UI despite validation logic working
ui_bugs.details: CURP validation errors not showing to users, making form validation invisible

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login not working - no redirect to admin panel after successful API call
ui_bugs.details: Backend authentication works but frontend doesn't handle login response properly

integration_issues.issue: Form submission works but user feedback is missing
Frontend-backend auth integration not working properly

issues: Card overlay z-index problems blocking user interactions

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical overlay issues: Card components are intercepting pointer events preventing button clicks and navigation. Also fix error message display and admin login redirect functionality.
